member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartAnnotation.OnTouchDown(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: The method is called when a touch interaction begins on the ChartAnnotation.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartAnnotation.OnTouchMove(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: The method is called when touch movements occur over the ChartAnnotation.

remarks.para: This method updates the annotation's position based on the current touch coordinates (X and Y).

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartAnnotation.OnTouchUp(System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: The method is called when the touch interaction with the ChartAnnotation ends.

remarks.para: This method finalizes the annotation's position using the last known touch coordinates (X and Y).

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.CategoryAxis
member.summary: The CategoryAxis is an indexed based axis that plots values based on the index of the data point collection. It displays string values in axis labels.
member.remarks:
Category axis supports only for the X(horizontal) axis.
To render an axis, add the category axis instance to the chart’s collection as shown in the following code sample.
# [MainPage.xaml](#tab/tabid-1)
<chart:SfCartesianChart>
<chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes> <chart:CategoryAxis/> </chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes>
</chart:SfCartesianChart>
# [MainPage.xaml.cs](#tab/tabid-2)
SfCartesianChart chart = new SfCartesianChart();
CategoryAxis xaxis = new CategoryAxis(); chart.XAxes.Add(xaxis);
***
The CategoryAxis supports the following features. Refer to the corresponding APIs, for more details and example codes.
Title - To render the title, refer to this property.
Grid Lines - To show and customize the grid lines, refer these , and properties.
Axis Line - To customize the axis line using the property.
Labels Customization - To customize the axis labels, refer to this property.
Inversed Axis - Inverse the axis using the property.
Axis Crossing - For axis crossing, refer these , , and properties.
Label Placement - To place the axis labels in between or on the tick lines, refer to this property.
Interval - To define the interval between the axis labels, refer to this property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.CategoryAxis.IntervalProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.CategoryAxis.LabelPlacementProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.CategoryAxis.ArrangeByIndexProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.CategoryAxis.PlotBandsProperty
member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.CategoryAxis.LabelPlacement
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether to place the axis label in between or on the tick lines.

remarks.para: BetweenTicks - Used to place the axis label between the ticks.
OnTicks - Used to place the axis label with the tick as the center.
Note: This is only applicable for .

member.value: It accepts the values and the default value is OnTicks.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.CategoryAxis.Interval
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to customize the interval between the axis labels.
member.remarks: If this property is not set, the interval will be calculated automatically.
member.value: It accepts double values and the default value is double.NaN.
member.example:
# [MainPage.xaml](#tab/tabid-5)
<chart:SfCartesianChart>
<chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes> <chart:CategoryAxis Interval="2" /> </chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes>
</chart:SfCartesianChart>
# [MainPage.xaml.cs](#tab/tabid-6)
SfCartesianChart chart = new SfCartesianChart();
CategoryAxis xaxis = new CategoryAxis(){ Interval = 2, }; chart.XAxes.Add(xaxis);
***

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.CategoryAxis.ArrangeByIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that determines whether to arrange the axis labels by index or by value.

remarks.para: True - Used to arrange the axis labels by index.
False - Used to arrange the axis labels by value.

member.value: Its default is True.
member.example:
# [MainPage.xaml](#tab/tabid-7)
<chart:SfCartesianChart>
<chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes> <chart:CategoryAxis ArrangeByIndex="False" /> </chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes>
</chart:SfCartesianChart>
# [MainPage.xaml.cs](#tab/tabid-8)
SfCartesianChart chart = new SfCartesianChart();
CategoryAxis xaxis = new CategoryAxis(){ ArrangeByIndex = false, }; chart.XAxes.Add(xaxis);
***

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartAxis
member.summary: The ChartAxis is the base class for all types of axes.

remarks.para: The ChartAxis is used to locate a data point inside the chart area. Charts typically have two axes that are used to measure and categorize data.
The Vertical(Y) axis always uses numerical scale.
The Horizontal(X) axis supports the Category, Numeric and Date-time.

member.summary: Gets or sets the value for the rotation angle of the axis labels.
member.value: It accepts the double values and the default value is 0.
member.remarks:
Label rotation angle can be set from -90 to 90 degrees.
Note: This is only applicable for the secondary axis of the .

To customize the axis labels appearance, you need to create an instance of the class and set to the property.
Null values are invalid.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartAxis.IsInversed
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates whether the axis' visible range is inversed.
member.value: It accepts the bool values and its default value is False.
member.remarks: When the axis is inversed, it will render points from right to left for the horizontal axis, and top to bottom for the vertical axis.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.DateTimeAxis
member.summary: DateTimeAxis is used to plot DateTime values. The date-time axis uses date time scale and displays date-time values as axis labels in the specified format.
member.remarks:
To render an axis, the datetime axis instance to be added in chart’s collection as per the following code snippet.
# [MainPage.xaml](#tab/tabid-1)
<chart:SfCartesianChart>
<chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes> <chart:DateTimeAxis/> </chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes>
</chart:SfCartesianChart>
# [MainPage.xaml.cs](#tab/tabid-2)
SfCartesianChart chart = new SfCartesianChart();
DateTimeAxis xaxis = new DateTimeAxis(); chart.XAxes.Add(xaxis);

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.DateTimeCategoryAxis
member.summary: The DateTimeCategoryAxis is a specialized axis for plotting chronological data where the axis labels represent dates and times.
member.remarks:
The DateTimeCategoryAxis is used only for the X(horizontal) axis in charts.
To render a DateTimeCategory axis, add its instance to the charts collection as shown in the following code sample.
# [MainPage.xaml](#tab/tabid-1)
<chart:SfCartesianChart>
<chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes> <chart:DateTimeCategoryAxis Interval="1" IntervalType="Months"/> </chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes>
</chart:SfCartesianChart>
# [MainPage.xaml.cs](#tab/tabid-2)
SfCartesianChart chart = new SfCartesianChart();
DateTimeCategoryAxis xAxis = new DateTimeCategoryAxis() { Interval = 1, IntervalType = DateTimeIntervalType.Months }; chart.XAxes.Add(xAxis);
***
The DateTimeCategoryAxis supports the following features. Refer to the corresponding APIs for more details and example codes.
Title - To render the title on the axis, refer to the property.
Grid Lines - To show and customize grid lines, refer to and properties.
Axis Line - Customize the axis line using the property.
Labels Customization - Customize axis labels using the property.
Inversed Axis - Invert the axis using the property.
Axis Crossing - For axis crossing, refer to , , and properties.
Interval - Define the interval between axis labels using the and properties.

member.remarks: Defines the collection of plot bands for the DateTimeCategory axis.

member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.
member.remarks: The property represents the interval value for the DateTimeCategory axis.

member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.
member.remarks: Defines the type of interval for the DateTimeCategory axis.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.DateTimeCategoryAxis.PlotBands
member.summary: Gets or sets the collection of plot bands.
member.value: It accepts and the default value is null.

remarks.para: Plot bands are used to shade specific regions in the chart to improve data visualization.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.DateTimeCategoryAxis.Interval
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that can be used to change the interval between labels.
member.value: It accepts double values and the default value is double.NaN.

remarks.para: If this property is not set, the interval will be calculated automatically.
By default, the interval will be calculated based on the minimum and maximum values of the provided data.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.DateTimeCategoryAxis.IntervalType
member.summary: Gets or sets the type of interval to be displayed in the axis.
member.value: It accepts values and the default value is DateTimeIntervalType.Auto.

remarks.para: The IntervalType property determines the unit of measurement for the axis interval.
When set to Auto, the interval type will be calculated automatically based on the data range.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartBehavior.OnTouchDown(Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartBase,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: This method is triggered when a touch event is detected on the chart.

remarks.para: Use the provided points X and Y to determine the exact location of the touch.
You can use these coordinates to interact with the chart, such as highlighting data points, showing tooltips, or performing other actions.
Example code:
remarks.b: Convert the touch coordinates to value coordinates if needed.
Show a tooltip with information about the data point.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartBehavior.OnTouchUp(Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartBase,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: This method is triggered when a touch event comes to an end. It is used to finalize the action initiated by the .

remarks.para: Use the provided points X and Y to determine the exact location of the touch.
You can use these coordinates to interact with the chart, such as highlighting data points, hiding tooltips, or performing other actions when the touch is released.
Example code:
remarks.b: Convert the touch coordinates to value coordinates if needed.
Hide a tooltip with information about the data point.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartBehavior.OnTouchMove(Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartBase,System.Single,System.Single)
member.summary: This Method is triggered when a touch point is moved along the touch surface.

remarks.para: Use the provided points X and Y to determine the exact location of the touch.
You can use these coordinates to define the desired actions to be executed when navigating the touch point across the chart area.
Example code:
remarks.b: Convert the touch coordinates to value coordinates if needed.
Show a tooltip with information about the data point.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartTooltipBehavior
member.summary: ChartTooltipBehavior is often used to specify extra information when the mouse pointer moved over an element.

remarks.para: The tooltip displays information while tapping or mouse hovering on the segment. To display the tooltip on the chart, you need to set the property as true in chart series.
Create an instance of the and set it to the chart’s property.
It provides the following options to customize the appearance of the tooltip:
Label Customization - To customize the appearance of the tooltip, refer to the , , , and properties.
Duration - To show the tooltip with delay and indicate how long the tooltip will be visible, refer to the property.

member.example:
# [Xaml](#tab/tabid-1)
<chart:SfCartesianChart>
<chart:SfCartesianChart.ChartBehaviors> <chart:ChartTooltipBehavior /> </chart:SfCartesianChart.ChartBehaviors>
</chart:SfCartesianChart>
# [C#](#tab/tabid-2)
SfCartesianChart chart = new SfCartesianChart();
ChartTooltipBehavior tooltipBehavior = new ChartTooltipBehavior(); chart.ChartBehaviors.Add(tooltipBehavior);
***

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartTrackballBehavior.ActivationMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates whether to activate trackball based on the specified touch mode.
member.value: It accepts values, with the default value being for Windows and Mac, and for Android and iOS.
member.remarks: On Windows, LongPress gesture is supported only through touch input, not with a mouse. Consequently, when ActivationMode is set to LongPress, the trackball activates only via touch interaction, not with a mouse interaction.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartZoomPanBehavior.EnablePinchZooming
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the finger gesture is enabled or disabled.
member.value: It accepts the bool values and its default value is true.
member.remarks: If this property is true, zooming is performed based on the pinch gesture of the user. If this property is false, zooming is performed based on the mouse wheel of the user.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartInteractiveBehavior
member.summary: is a class used to get the methods that are called when the touch interactions are made in the Chart area. By using that, the user can change the behavior for different actions like OnTouchDown, OnTouchMove, and OnTouchUP.

remarks.para: OnTouchDown() - gets called when the user makes the initial contact of a user's finger or touch input device with the Chart Area.
OnTouchMove() - gets called when a user's finger or touch input device is in contact with the Chart area and moves across its surface.
OnTouchUp() - gets called when a user lifts their finger or releases their touch input from the Chart area.
To use this method, create the class inherited by the ChartInteractiveBehavior class.
Then, create the instance for that class, and it must be added in the chart's as per the following code sample.

member.example:
# [ChartInteractionExt.cs](#tab/tabid-1)
public class ChartInteractionExt : ChartInteractiveBehavior { <!--omitted for brevity--> }
# [MainPage.xaml](#tab/tabid-2)
<chart:SfCartesianChart>
<!--omitted for brevity-->
<chart:SfCartesianChart.InteractiveBehavior> <local:ChartInteractionExt/> </chart:SfCartesianChart.InteractiveBehavior>
</chart:SfCartesianChart>
# [MainPage.xaml.cs](#tab/tabid-3)
SfCartesianChart chart = new SfCartesianChart();
ChartInteractionExt interaction = new ChartInteractionExt(); chart.ChartInteractiveBehavior = interaction;
***

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartBase.Title
member.summary: Gets or sets the title for chart. It supports the string or any view as title.
member.value: Default value is null.
member.remarks:
Example code for string as title.
# [MainPage.xaml](#tab/tabid-1)
<chart:SfCartesianChart Title="Average High/Low Temperature">
</chart:SfCartesianChart>
# [MainPage.xaml.cs](#tab/tabid-2)
SfCartesianChart chart = new SfCartesianChart(); chart.Title = "Average High / Low Temperature";
***
Example code for View as title.
# [MainPage.xaml](#tab/tabid-3)
<chart:SfCartesianChart>
<chart:SfCartesianChart.Title> <Label Text = "Average High/Low Temperature" HorizontalOptions="Fill" HorizontalTextAlignment="Center" VerticalOptions="Center" FontSize="16" TextColor="Black"/> </chart:SfCartesianChart.Title>
</chart:SfCartesianChart>
# [MainPage.xaml.cs](#tab/tabid-4)
SfCartesianChart chart = new SfCartesianChart(); chart.Title = new Label() { Text = "Average High / Low Temperature", HorizontalOptions = LayoutOptions.Fill, HorizontalTextAlignment = TextAlignment.Center, VerticalOptions = LayoutOptions.Center, FontSize = 16, TextColor = Colors.Black };

member.summary: Gets or sets the interactive behavior that allows to override and customize the touch interaction methods.
member.value: This property takes instance as value and its default value is null.

remarks.para: To use those touch interaction methods, create the class inherited by ChartInteractiveBehavior class.
Then Create the instance for that class and instance has to be added in the chart's as per the following code snippet.

member.example:
# [ChartInteractionExt.cs](#tab/tabid-1)
public class ChartInteractionExt : ChartInteractiveBehavior { <!--omitted for brevity--> }
# [MainPage.xaml](#tab/tabid-2)
<chart:SfCartesianChart>
<chart:SfCircularChart.BindingContext> <local:ViewModel/> </chart:SfCircularChart.BindingContext>
<!--omitted for brevity-->
<chart:SfCartesianChart.InteractiveBehavior> <local:ChartInteractionExt/> </chart:SfCartesianChart.InteractiveBehavior>
</chart:SfCartesianChart>
# [MainPage.xaml.cs](#tab/tabid-3)
SfCartesianChart chart = new SfCartesianChart();
ViewModel viewModel = new ViewModel(); chart.BindingContext = viewModel; ... ChartInteractionExt interaction = new ChartInteractionExt(); chart.ChartInteractiveBehavior = interaction; ...
***

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartBase.GetStreamAsync(Syncfusion.Maui.Core.ImageFileFormat)

summary.para: To convert a chart view to a stream, the GetStreamAsync method is used. Currently, the supported file formats are JPEG and PNG .
To get the stream for the chart view in PNG file format, use await chart.GetStreamAsync(ImageFileFormat.Png);
To get the stream for the chart view in JPEG file format, use await chart.GetStreamAsync(ImageFileFormat.Jpeg);
summary.remarks: The charts stream can only be rendered when the chart view is added to the visual tree.
summary.para: imageFileFormat Pass the required file format.

member.returns: Returns the chart view's stream in the desired file format.

summary.para: To save a chart view as an image in the desired file format, the SaveAsImage is used. Currently, the supported image formats are JPEG and PNG .
By default, the image format is PNG. For example, chart.SaveAsImage("Test");
Saved location: For Windows, Android, and Mac , the image will be saved in the Pictures folder , and for iOS , the image will be saved in the Photos Album folder .

remarks.para: In Windows and Mac , when you save an image with an already existing filename, the existing file is replaced with a new file, but the filename remains the same.
In iOS , due to its platform limitation, the image will be saved with the default filename, for example, IMG_001.jpeg, IMG_002.png and more.

summary.remarks: The chart view can be saved as an image only when the view is added to the visual tree.

member.summary: Represents the legend for the , , and classes.

</chart:SfCartesianChart>

member.summary: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether the legend is visible or not.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartLegend.Placement
member.summary: Gets or sets the placement for the legend in a chart.
member.remarks: Legends can be placed left, right, top, or bottom around the chart area.
member.value: It accepts values and the default value is .

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartLegend.IsFloating
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the legend floats over the chart's plot area.
member.remarks:
When this property is set to true, the legend detaches from its default docking position and can be positioned explicitly by using the and properties.
Note: This property is only applicable for Cartesian, Circular, Pyramid, and Funnel charts.
member.value: It accepts bool values and the default value is False.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartLegend.OffsetX
member.summary: Gets or sets the horizontal offset, in device-independent units, applied when the legend is floating.
member.remarks: This property is effective only when is true. Positive values move the legend to the right, and negative values move it to the left relative to its floating anchor point.
member.value: It accepts double values and the default value is 0.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartLegend.OffsetY
member.summary: Gets or sets the vertical offset, in device-independent units, applied when the legend is floating.
member.remarks: This property is effective only when is true. Positive values move the legend downward, and negative values move it upward relative to its floating anchor point.
member.value: It accepts double values and the default value is 0.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartLegend.ToggleSeriesVisibility
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether the chart series visibility by tapping the legend item.
member.value: It accepts bool values and the default value is False

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartLegend.ItemTemplate
member.summary: Gets or sets a template to customize the appearance of each legend item.
member.value: It accepts value.
member.example:
# [MainPage.xaml](#tab/tabid-12)
<chart:SfCircularChart>
<chart:SfCircularChart.Legend> <chart:ChartLegend> <chart:ChartLegend.ItemTemplate> <DataTemplate> <StackLayout Orientation="Horizontal" > <Rectangle HeightRequest="12" WidthRequest="12" Margin="3" Background="{Binding IconBrush}"/> <Label Text="{Binding Text}" Margin="3"/> </StackLayout> </DataTemplate> </chart:ChartLegend.ItemTemplate> </chart:ChartLegend> </chart:SfCircularChart.Legend>
<chart:PieSeries ItemsSource="{Binding Data}" XBindingPath="XValue" YBindingPath="YValue"/>
</chart:SfCircularChart>

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartPlotBand
member.summary: Serves as a base class for , . This class provides options to customize the appearance of plot bands.

remarks.para: IsVisible - To customize the visibility of plot band, refer to this property.
AssociatedAxisStart - To customize the segment start of the plot band, refer to this property.
AssociatedAxisEnd - To customize the segment end of the plot band, refer to this property.
AssociatedAxisName - To set the axis name for the plot band, refer to this property.
Fill - To customize the background color of the plot band, refer to this property.
Stroke - To customize the stroke color, refer to this property.
StrokeWidth - To customize the stroke width, refer to this property.
Text - To set the label for the plot band, refer to this property.
Size - To customize the width of the plot band, refer to this property.
IsRepeatable - To customize the repetition of the plot band, refer to this property.
LabelStyle - To customize the label for the plot band, refer to this property.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.AreaSeries
member.summary: The is a collection of data points connected to form a closed loop area, filled with the specified color.

remarks.para: To render a series, create an instance of class, and add it to the collection.
It provides options for , , , , and to customize the appearance.

EnableTooltip - A tooltip displays information while tapping or mouse hovering above a segment. To display the tooltip on a chart, you need to set the property as true in class, and also refer property.

Data Label - Data labels are used to display values related to a chart segment. To render the data labels, you need to set the property as true in class. To customize the chart data labels alignment, placement, and label styles, you need to create an instance of and set to the property.
Animation - To animate the series, set True to the property.
LegendIcon - To customize the legend icon using the property.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.BoxAndWhiskerSeries
member.summary: The class represents a series that plots box-and-whisker diagrams in a .

remarks.para: A box-and-whisker plot is a chart that shows the distribution of a dataset, indicating the median, quartiles, and outliers.
To render a series, create an instance of class, and add it to the collection.
It provides options for ,, , and to customize the appearance.

EnableTooltip - A tooltip displays information while tapping or mouse hovering above a segment. To display the tooltip on a chart, you need to set the property as true in class, and also refer property.
Animation - To animate the series, set True to the property.
LegendIcon - Customize the legend icon using the property.
Spacing - To specify the spacing between segments using the property.
Width - To specify the width of the box using the property.
This series does not yet support trackball behaviour.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.BoxAndWhiskerSeries.BoxPlotMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the plot mode, which defines how the box plot series should be rendered.

remarks.para: - This is the default value, which plots the minimum, maximum, median, and quartiles of the data.
- This plots all the data values within the interquartile range (IQR), in addition to the minimum, maximum, median, and quartiles.
- This plots all the data values outside the interquartile range (IQR), in addition to the minimum, maximum, median, and quartiles.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.BubbleSeries
member.summary: The displays a collection of data points represented by a bubble of different size.

remarks.para: To render a series, create an instance of class, and add it to the collection.
It provides options for , , , , and to customize the appearance.
MaximumRadius - Specifies the maximum radius to the bubble series property.
MinimumRadius - Specifies the minimum radius to the bubble series property.
SizeValuePath - Specify the bubble size using the property.
ShowZeroSizeBubbles - Specifies the option to show zero size bubble, when its true the zero size bubble render with minimum radius property.

EnableTooltip - A tooltip displays information while tapping or mouse hovering above a segment. To display the tooltip on a chart, you need to set the property as true in class, and also refer property.

Data Label - Data labels are used to display values related to a chart segment. To render the data labels, you need to set the property as true in class. To customize the chart data labels alignment, placement, and label styles, you need to create an instance of and set to the property.
Animation - To animate the series, set True to the property.
LegendIcon - To customize the legend icon using the property.

member.example:
# [MainWindow.xaml](#tab/tabid-13)
<chart:SfCartesianChart>
<chart:SfCartesianChart.Resources> <DataTemplate x:Key="tooltipTemplate1"> <StackLayout Orientation = "Horizontal" > <Label Text="{Binding Item.XValue}" TextColor="Black" FontAttributes="Bold" FontSize="12" HorizontalOptions="Center" VerticalOptions="Center"/> <Label Text = " : " TextColor="Black" FontAttributes="Bold" FontSize="12" HorizontalOptions="Center" VerticalOptions="Center"/> <Label Text = "{Binding Item.YValue}" TextColor="Black" FontAttributes="Bold" FontSize="12" HorizontalOptions="Center" VerticalOptions="Center"/> </StackLayout> </DataTemplate> </chart:SfCartesianChart.Resources>
<chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes> <chart:NumericalAxis/> </chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes>
<chart:SfCartesianChart.YAxes> <chart:NumericalAxis/> </chart:SfCartesianChart.YAxes>
<chart:SfCartesianChart.Series> <chart:ColumnSeries ItemsSource="{Binding Data}" XBindingPath="XValue" YBindingPath="YValue" EnableTooltip="True" TooltipTemplate="{StaticResource tooltipTemplate1}"> </chart:ColumnSeries> </chart:SfCartesianChart.Series>
</chart:SfCartesianChart>
***

It Provides options for , , , , and to customize the appearance.

EnableTooltip - The tooltip displays information while tapping or mouse hovering on the segment. To display the tooltip on the chart, you need to set the property as true in and refer to the property.

Data Label - Data labels are used to display values related to a chart segment. To render the data labels, you need to set the property as true in the class. To customize the chart data labels’ alignment, placement, and label styles, you need to create an instance of and set it to the property.
Animation - To animate the series, set True to the property.

Selection - To enable the data point selection in the series, create an instance of the and set it to the property of the doughnut series. To highlight the selected segment, set the value for the property in the class.
LegendIcon - To customize the legend icon using the property.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.FastLineSeries
member.summary: The is a special kind of line series that can render a collection with a large number of data points.

remarks.para: To render a series, create an instance of class, and add it to the collection.
It provides options for , , , , and to customize the appearance.

EnableTooltip - A tooltip displays information while tapping or mouse hovering above a segment. To display the tooltip on a chart, you need to set the property as true in class, and also refer property.

Data Label - Data labels are used to display values related to a chart segment. To render the data labels, you need to set the property as true in class. To customize the chart data labels alignment, placement, and label styles, you need to create an instance of and set to the property.
Animation - To animate the series, set True to the property.
LegendIcon - To customize the legend icon using the property.

member.summary: Gets or sets the brush to be used for bullish points in a financial chart. It is typically used in conjunction with a or series to visually represent positive price movements or bullish market conditions.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.PieSeries
member.summary: The displays data as a proportion of the whole. Its most commonly used to make comparisons among a set of given data.

remarks.para: To render a series, create an instance of the pie series class, and add it to the collection.
It Provides options for , , , , and to customize the appearance.

EnableTooltip - The tooltip displays information while tapping or mouse hovering on the segment. To display the tooltip on the chart, you need to set the property as true in and refer to the property.

Data Label - Data labels are used to display values related to a chart segment. To render the data labels, you need to set the property as true in the class. To customize the chart data labels’ alignment, placement, and label styles, you need to create an instance of and set it to the property.
Animation - To animate the series, set True to the property.

Selection - To enable the data point selection in the series, create an instance of the and set it to the property of the pie series. To highlight the selected segment, set the value for the property in the class.
LegendIcon - To customize the legend icon using the property.

member.summary: Gets or sets the index value of the segment to be exploded. This is a bindable property.

member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the exploding distance of the segment. This is a bindable property.

member.summary: Gets or sets the value that indicates whether to explode the segment on touch. This is a bindable property.

member.summary: Identifies the bindable property.

member.name: M:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.PieSeries.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.PieSeries.ExplodeIndex
member.summary: Gets or sets the index value of the segment to be exploded.
member.value: This property takes an value, and its default value is -1.

remarks.para: To explode a segment, create an instance for any circular series, and assign value to the property.

member.example:
# [Xaml](#tab/tabid-4)
<chart:SfCircularChart>
<chart:SfCircularChart.Series> <chart:PieSeries ItemsSource="{Binding Data}" XBindingPath="XValue" YBindingPath="YValue" ExplodeIndex = "3"/> </chart:SfCircularChart.Series>
</chart:SfCircularChart>
***

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.PieSeries.ExplodeRadius
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that defines the exploding distance of the segments.
member.value: This property takes a value, and its default value is 10d.

remarks.para: To explode a segment to a specific length, create an instance for any circular series, and assign value to both and properties.
The value needs to be greater than zero.

member.example:
# [Xaml](#tab/tabid-5)
<chart:SfCircularChart>
<chart:SfCircularChart.Series> <chart:PieSeries ItemsSource="{Binding Data}" XBindingPath="XValue" YBindingPath="YValue" ExplodeIndex = "3" ExplodeRadius="20"/> </chart:SfCircularChart.Series>
</chart:SfCircularChart>
***

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.PieSeries.ExplodeOnTouch
member.summary: Gets or sets a value indicating whether to explode the segment by touch or tap interaction.
member.value: This property takes the value, and its default value is false.

remarks.para: To explode a selected segment by tap action, create an instance for any circular series, and assign the property value as "True"

member.example:
# [Xaml](#tab/tabid-6)
<chart:SfCircularChart>
<chart:SfCircularChart.Series> <chart:PieSeries ItemsSource="{Binding Data}" XBindingPath="XValue" YBindingPath="YValue" ExplodeOnTouch="True"/> </chart:SfCircularChart.Series>
</chart:SfCircularChart>
***

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.PieSeries.ExplodeAll
member.summary: Gets or sets a value that causes all the data points to explode from the center of the chart.
member.value: It accepts bool, and the default is false.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.PieSeries.GroupTo
member.summary: Gets or sets the value that specifies the grouping for segments containing a minimum value of data points below the specified threshold.
member.value: This property takes a value, and its default value is double.NaN.

remarks.para: To group the segments to a specific value, create an instance for pie series, and assign value to property.

member.example:
# [Xaml](#tab/tabid-7)
<chart:SfCircularChart>
<chart:PieSeries ItemsSource="{Binding Data}" XBindingPath="XValue" YBindingPath="YValue" GroupTo = "30" />
</chart:SfCircularChart>
***

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.PieSeries.GroupMode
member.summary: Gets or sets the group mode, which determines the type of grouping based on slice Angle, actual data point Value, or Percentage.
member.value: This property takes a value, and its default value is PieGroupMode.Value.

remarks.para: To specify group mode type based on angle or data point value or percentage, create an instance for pie series, and assign value to property.

member.example:
# [Xaml](#tab/tabid-8)
<chart:SfCircularChart>
<chart:PieSeries ItemsSource="{Binding Data}" XBindingPath="XValue" YBindingPath="YValue" GroupTo="90" GroupMode="Angle" />
</chart:SfCircularChart>
***

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.RangeAreaSeries
member.summary: The is a chart type to represent data as filled areas between two ranges, typically depicting a range of values or uncertainty.

remarks.para: To render a series, create an instance of class, and add it to the collection.

EnableTooltip - A tooltip displays information while tapping or mouse hovering above a segment. To display the tooltip on a chart, you need to set the property as true in class, and also refer property.

Data Label - Data labels are used to display values related to a chart segment. To render the data labels, you need to set the property as true in class. To customize the chart data labels alignment, placement, and label styles, you need to create an instance of and set to the property.
Animation - To animate the series, set True to the property.
LegendIcon - To customize the legend icon using the property.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.RangeColumnSeries

remarks.para: To render a series, create an instance of class, and add it to the collection.

EnableTooltip - A tooltip displays information while tapping or mouse hovering above a segment. To display the tooltip on a chart, you need to set the property as true in class, and also refer property.

Data Label - Data labels are used to display values related to a chart segment. To render the data labels, you need to set the property as true in class. To customize the chart data labels alignment, placement, and label styles, you need to create an instance of and set to the property.
Animation - To animate the series, set True to the property.
LegendIcon - To customize the legend icon using the property.
Range column series do not yet support trackball behavior.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartAxisTitle
member.summary: Represents the chart axis's title class.
member.remarks:
To customize the chart axis's title, add the instance to the property as shown in the following code sample. # [MainPage.xaml](#tab/tabid-1)
<chart:SfCartesianChart>
<chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes> <chart:CategoryAxis> <chart:CategoryAxis.Title> <chart:ChartAxisTitle Text="AxisTitle" TextColor="Red" Background="Yellow/> </chart:CategoryAxis.Title> </chart:CategoryAxis> </chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes>
</chart:SfCartesianChart>
# [MainPage.xaml.cs](#tab/tabid-2)
SfCartesianChart chart = new SfCartesianChart();
CategoryAxis xaxis = new CategoryAxis(); xaxis.Title = new ChartAxisTitle() { Text = "AxisTitle", TextColor = Colors.Red, Background = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.Yellow) }; chart.XAxes.Add(xaxis);
***
It provides more options to customize the chart axis title.
Text - To sets the title for axis, refer to this property.
TextColor - To customize the text color, refer to this property.
Background - To customize the background color, refer to this property.
Stroke - To customize the stroke color, refer to this property.
StrokeWidth - To modify the stroke width, refer to this property.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartAxisTickStyle
member.summary: Represents a style class that can be used to customize the axis's tick.
member.remarks:
To customize the chart axis's tick, create an instance of and set it to the property as shown in the following code sample. # [MainWindow.xaml](#tab/tabid-1)
<chart:SfCartesianChart>
<chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes> <chart:NumericalAxis MinorTicksPerInterval="4"> <chart:NumericalAxis.MajorTickStyle> <chart:ChartAxisTickStyle Stroke="Red" StrokeWidth="1"/> </chart:NumericalAxis.MajorTickStyle> </chart:NumericalAxis> </chart:SfCartesianChart.XAxes>
<chart:SfCartesianChart.YAxes> <chart:NumericalAxis/> </chart:SfCartesianChart.YAxes>
</chart:SfCartesianChart>
# [MainWindow.cs](#tab/tabid-2)
SfCartesianChart chart = new SfCartesianChart();
NumericalAxis xAxis = new NumericalAxis(); xAxis.MajorTickStyle.StrokeWidth = 1; xAxis.MajorTickStyle.Stroke = new SolidColorBrush(Colors.Red); chart.XAxes.Add(xAxis);
NumericalAxis yAxis = new NumericalAxis(); chart.YAxes.Add(yAxis)
***
It provides more options to customize the chart axis title.
TickSize - To customize the length of the axis tick, refer to this property.
Stroke - To customize the color of the axis tick, refer to this property.
StrokeWidth - To customize the width of the axis ticks, refer to this property.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartDataLabelStyle.LabelPadding

member.value: It accepts values and its default value is Transparent.

member.name: P:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.EmptyPointSettings.StrokeWidth
member.summary: Gets or sets the value for empty point stroke width.
member.remarks:
The value needs to be greater than zero.
EmptyPointSettings of StrokeWidth is not supported for Waterfall series.
member.value: It accepts double values and its default value is 1.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.EmptyPointMode
member.summary: Defines modes for handling empty data points in a chart series.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.EmptyPointMode.None
member.summary: Leaves empty points unmodified, maintaining them as NaN (Not a Number). Suitable for explicitly skipping or not displaying missing data points.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.EmptyPointMode.Zero
member.summary: Replaces empty points with a value of zero. Useful for treating missing data points as zero values, maintaining continuity in series where a missing data point logically represents zero impact.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.EmptyPointMode.Average
member.summary: Calculates empty points as the average of the surrounding data points. Ideal for approximating missing data by averaging neighboring values, facilitating smooth transitions in data where interim values are uncertain.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.AxisElementPosition
member.summary: Represents the axis elements position in the ChartAxis. The axis elements can be positioned inside or outside the chart area.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.AxisElementPosition.Inside
member.summary: Positions the elements inside the axis line.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.AxisElementPosition.Outside
member.summary: Positions the elements outside the axis line.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.OverflowMode.None
member.summary: No action will be taken and priority goes for SmartLabelAlignment

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.OverflowMode.Trim
member.summary: Data label text will be trimmed when data labels get overflow from its region area

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.OverflowMode.Shift
member.summary: Data label text will be shifted to outside when data labels get overflow from its region area.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.OverflowMode.Hide
member.summary: Data label text will be hidden when data labels get overflow from its region area.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.AxisLabelsIntersectAction

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.AxisLabelsIntersectAction.None
member.summary: No special action is taken. Labels may intersect.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.AxisLabelsIntersectAction.MultipleRows
member.summary: Labels are wrapped into multiple rows to prevent intersection.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.AxisLabelsIntersectAction.Hide
member.summary: Some labels are hidden to avoid intersection.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.AxisLabelsIntersectAction.Wrap
member.summary: Labels are wrapped into multiple rows to prevent intersection.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.LabelContext.YValue
member.summary: Indicates that label should contain Y value of series point.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.LabelContext.Percentage
member.summary: Indicates that label should contain percentage value of series point among other points. It is recommended to use PieSeries, DoughnutSeries, and BarSeries with LabelContext set to Percentage.

member.summary: Specifies which type of segment to consider for rendering.

member.summary: Specifies the orientation of the chart.
member.remarks: This enum allows switching between vertical and horizontal orientations for charts that support both display modes.

member.summary: Indicates the chart should be rendered in vertical orientation.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ChartOrientation.Horizontal
member.summary: Indicates the chart should be rendered in horizontal orientation.

member.name: T:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.PyramidMode
member.summary: Represents the rendering mode of the pyramid chart.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.PyramidMode.Linear
member.summary: This mode represents the pyramid chart with linearly increasing or decreasing widths of the pyramid segments. The width of each segment is proportional to its corresponding value.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.PyramidMode.Surface
member.summary: This mode represents the pyramid chart with segments that have varying surface areas. The size of each segment is determined by the square root of its corresponding value, resulting in a visually balanced representation.

member.summary: Indicates that the label should contain the Y value of the data points.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.PyramidDataLabelContext.XValue
member.summary: Indicates that the label should contain the X value of the data points.

member.summary: Specify whether to display both the horizontal error bar and vertical error bar.

member.summary: Specify whether to display only the horizontal error bar.

member.summary: Specify whether to display only the vertical error bar.

member.summary: Represents the error bar type for .

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ErrorBarType.Fixed
member.summary: This refers to a type of error bar where the error bars are fixed to a specified value rather than being determined by the data.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ErrorBarType.Percentage
member.summary: Specified to Calculate the percentage error for a given data point and display the error bar accordingly.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ErrorBarType.StandardDeviation
member.summary: Indicate a statistical measure that measures the amount of variation or dispersion of a set of values from their mean or average value.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ErrorBarType.StandardError
member.summary: This type specifies that the statistical measure of the variability of sample statistics and is often used to represent the amount of uncertainty or variation associated with the estimated mean or other summary statistic in an error bar chart

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ErrorBarType.Custom
member.summary: By using this type, we can be able to customize the horizontal error and vertical error for each data point.

member.summary: This indicates the error bars are drawn in both directions.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ErrorBarDirection.Minus
member.summary: This indicates the error bars are only drawn in a negative direction.

member.name: F:Syncfusion.Maui.Charts.ErrorBarDirection.Plus
member.summary: This indicates the error bars are only drawn in a positive direction.
